description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3-jdk-11-slim Docker image and defines two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs `cd plugin`, `java -version`, `mvn -v`, `mvn -B clean`, and `mvn -B package -s settings.xml`, caches the .m2/ directory, and publishes the plugin/target/*.jar files as artifacts. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs only on the master branch, executes `cd plugin`, `java -version`, `mvn -v`, `mvn -B clean`, and `mvn -B deploy -s settings.xml`.
